_comment: Ranking stage config. See RANKING.md for full documentation.
_comment_col_maps: Override these if your extractor output uses different column names.
_comment_formatting: mode: 'cls_sep' (default) or 'plain'. cls_sep uses literal special tokens as section boundary markers.
_comment_extraction: extract_chunk_size: number of documents processed per checkpoint (default 5000). Set smaller if RAM is tight. checkpoint_dir: where raw-candidates parquet chunks are stored.
_comment_semantic: model_name: any sentence-transformers model. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 is 22M params, 384-dim, fast on CPU/Apple Silicon. Max input: 256 tokens (longer abstracts are silently truncated). doc_chunk_size: number of unique documents per chunk; enables checkpoint/resume (required for 10M+ docs). Set to null to disable chunking (loads all doc embeddings into RAM at once).
_comment_tfidf: smoothed_idf uses sklearn formula: log((N+1)/(df+1))+1. N = distinct row_ids with candidates.
_comment_clustering: semantic_threshold: cosine similarity cutoff for merging candidates. 0.85 targets near-synonyms; lower → broader clusters. spacy_model must have lemmatizer enabled.
